Tools for creating C array headers from binaries, extracting Git info, processing linker scripts, and converting linked targets in a Waf build system.


## Files
- **[binary_header.py](binary_header.py.md)**: Creates a header file with a C array from a binary or hexadecimal source file using Waf build system tasks.
- **[gitinfo.py](gitinfo.py.md)**: Extracts Git revision details including tag, commit, timestamp, and version information.
- **[ldscript.py](ldscript.py.md)**: Processes linker scripts for C programs and shared libraries in a Waf build environment.
- **[objcopy.py](objcopy.py.md)**: Support for converting linked targets to ihex, srec, or binary files using objcopy in a build system.
